_comment: GYDS Chain — Uptime Kuma monitor reference config. Import via the setup-uptime.sh script or add manually in the UI.

monitors.name: GYDS RPC Node — HTTP
monitors.description: Public RPC node health endpoint. Returns {status: ok} when healthy.

monitors.name: GYDS RPC Node — JSON-RPC
monitors.description: Verifies the JSON-RPC endpoint returns a block number.

monitors.name: GYDS RPC Node — Metrics
monitors.description: Checks that Prometheus metrics are being served.

monitors.name: GYDS Validator Node — P2P
monitors.description: TCP check on validator P2P port. RPC (8545) is intentionally not monitored externally.

monitors.name: GYDS Full Node — P2P
monitors.description: TCP check on fullnode P2P port.

monitors.name: GYDS Full Node — RPC
monitors.description: Fullnode health check — only reachable if monitoring server is on the same network or VPN.

monitors.name: GYDS Lite Node — P2P
monitors.description: TCP check on litenode P2P port.

monitors.name: GYDS Lite Node — RPC
monitors.description: Litenode health check — only reachable over VPN or internal network.

monitors.name: WireGuard VPN Server — UDP
monitors.description: Checks WireGuard UDP port is reachable on the VPN server.
